## Description of Changes
Please include a summary of the changes and the architectural impact. Explain the reasoning behind significant technical decisions.

Closes # (Add the issue number here. Ex: Closes #12)

## Type of Change
Please check the relevant options with an 'x':
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (changes to comments, README, etc.)
